summary: A brief podcast description and timestamp list for an interview with Jeff Dean and Noam Shazeer. The text outlines their 25-year tenure at Google and highlights Jeff Dean's vision for 'Pathways,' focusing on hardware-algorithm co-design and massive-scale Mixture of Experts models.

principles.statement: Hardware and algorithmic design should form a mutually-reinforcing loop.
principles.rationale: This co-design is central to the 'Pathways' vision for advancing AI capabilities and moving beyond simple autoregression.

mental_models.name: The Universal MoE
mental_models.description: Envisioning the entirety of a massive organization's systems and compute being routed through a single, gigantic Mixture of Experts (MoE) model.
mental_models.example: Imagining all of Google-the-company going through one huge MoE model.
